items.caption: An interior view of a residential space, specifically a hallway leading to a bedroom and closet. the hallway is narrow with a light-colored floor and walls. on the left, there is a closed beige door with a metallic handle. the door in the center is ajar, revealing a glimpse of a bedroom with a wooden floor. the door on the right is closed and appears to be made of a metallic material with a handle. above the door, there is a white light fixture. the text overlay at the bottom of the image reads "view of bedroom and closet doors from living room." the style of the image is a straightforward, real estate or architectural photograph meant to showcase the layout of the apartment.
